scope: toy contract for checking that simulated evidence has declared boundaries
fidelity_standard: conceptual fidelity only; no physical simulation is run
input_assumptions: schema validation is the only executed operation
approximation_liberties: uses schema fixture instead of a simulator
supported_claim_boundary: record-shape validation only; no simulation feasibility result
observed_result_boundary: no simulated result is observed by this fixture
failure_behavior: claims missing declared fidelity, resources, or transfer boundary remain blocked or residualized
